name: Apple Crumble Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mix together the flour, brown sugar, oats, and melted butter. Spread half of this mixture in a 9 x 13 inch pan. Pat it down.
In a saucepan, combine the sugar, cornstarch, salt, and water. Cook over moderate heat, stirring until thickened. Add the sliced apples and vanilla. Stir to coat well. Spread evenly over the crumbly mixture in the pan.
Top with the remaining crumbs. Bake in a 350°F oven for about one hour. Serve with vanilla ice cream if desired.
